I’ve got the backend shape now. The suggestion request can share the draft error payload and run with the same read-only options used by ticket updates, while returning only ephemeral suggestion data to the renderer.

items.text: Add shared IPC/types/schema and backend suggestion generation
Add renderer button, modal states, and create action
Run typecheck and tests, fix issues

payload.text: I’m starting with the shared contract and backend because the renderer should call a typed endpoint, not a loose IPC string. The new result will reuse the existing draft error payload so failed generation and failed draft creation report consistently.

124-export const parseSchema = <A>(schema: RelaySchema<A>, input: unknown): A => {
125-  try {
126-    return Schema.decodeUnknownSync(schema as Schema.Decoder<A>)(input);
127-  } catch (error) {
128-    throw normalizeSchemaError(error);
129-  }
130-};
131-
132-export const isRelaySchemaError = (error: unknown): error is Schema.SchemaError => Schema.isSchemaError(error);
133-
134:export const ticketPrioritySchema: RelaySchema<TicketPriority> = Schema.Literals(["low", "medium", "high", "urgent"]);
135-
136-export const ticketTypeSchema: RelaySchema<TicketType> = Schema.Literals(["task", "epic"]);
137-
138-export const runStatusSchema: RelaySchema<RunStatus> = Schema.Literals([
139-  "idle",
--
202-  settings: projectSettingsSchema
203-});
204-
205-export const ticketFrontMatterSchema: RelaySchema<TicketFrontMatter> = passthroughStruct({
206-  schemaVersion: Schema.Literal(1),
207-  id: nonEmptyString,
208-  title: nonEmptyString,
209-  ticketType: withDefault(ticketTypeSchema, () => "task" as const),
210-  status: nonEmptyString,
211-  position: numberSchema,
212:  priority: ticketPrioritySchema,
213-  labels: stringArrayWithDefault(),
214-  parentEpicId: nullableStringWithDefault(),
215-  subticketIds: stringArrayWithDefault(),
216-  blockedByIds: stringArrayWithDefault(),
217-  createdAt: isoString,
--
293-const ticketDraftResearchSchema: RelaySchema<TicketDraftResearch> = Schema.Struct({
294-  generatedAt: withDefault(Schema.String, () => ""),
295-  checkedUrls: withDefault(mutableArray(ticketDraftResearchUrlSchema), () => []),
296-  inspectedFiles: withDefault(mutableArray(ticketDraftResearchFileSchema), () => []),
297-  limitations: stringArrayWithDefault(),
298-  limits: withDefault(ticketDraftResearchLimitsSchema, defaultTicketDraftResearchLimits)
299-});
300-
301-const ticketDraftBaseFields = {
302-  title: nonEmptyString,
303:  priority: ticketPrioritySchema,
304-  labels: stringArrayWithDefault(),
305-  context: withDefault(Schema.String, () => ""),
306-  researchFindings: stringArrayWithDefault(),
307-  requirements: stringArrayWithDefault(),
308-  implementationPlan: stringArrayWithDefault(),
--
325-}).check(
326-  Schema.makeFilter<TicketDraft>((draft) =>
327-    draft.ticketType === "task" && draft.subtickets.length > 0
328-      ? { path: ["subtickets"], issue: "Only epic ticket drafts can contain subtickets." }
329-      : undefined
330-  )
331-);
332-
333-export const agentTicketUpdateSchema: RelaySchema<AgentTicketUpdate> = strictStruct({
334-  title: nonEmptyString,
335:  priority: ticketPrioritySchema,
336-  labels: stringArrayWithDefault(),
337-  markdown: nonEmptyString,
338-  clarificationQuestions: stringArrayWithDefault()
339-});
340-
--
358-  ticketId: nonEmptyString,
359-  questions: withDefault(mutableArray(clarificationQuestionSchema), () => [])
360-});
361-
362-export const gitMetadataOptionsSchema: RelaySchema<GitMetadataOptions> = passthroughStruct({
363-  force: Schema.optional(Schema.Boolean)
364-});
365-
366-const subticketCreateInputFields = {
367-  title: Schema.String,
368:  priority: ticketPrioritySchema,
369-  labels: stringArrayWithDefault(),
370-  markdown: Schema.String,
371-  status: Schema.optional(Schema.String),
372-  blockedByIds: Schema.optional(mutableArray(Schema.String))
373-} as const;

The backend endpoint is in place. I’m moving to the renderer now: adding the topbar action, a modal that starts generation on mount, and row-level Create handling that calls the existing async `createDraft` endpoint.

The modal now opens immediately and reuses an in-flight generation promise in development, so React strict-mode remounts won’t double-start the backend request. I’m adding focused styling for the suggestion rows and their create/error states next.

src/main/ipc/methods/tickets.ts(66,5): error TS2322: Type '(_event: unknown, projectPath: string) => Effect<{ ok: boolean; suggestions: TicketSuggestion[]; error?: undefined; } | { ok: boolean; error: TicketDraftErrorPayload; suggestions?: undefined; }, unknown, never>' is not assignable to type '(event: unknown, projectPath: string) => Effect<TicketSuggestionsGenerateResult, unknown, never>'.
  Type 'Effect<{ ok: boolean; suggestions: TicketSuggestion[]; error?: undefined; } | { ok: boolean; error: TicketDraftErrorPayload; suggestions?: undefined; }, unknown, never>' is not assignable to type 'Effect<TicketSuggestionsGenerateResult, unknown, never>'.
    Type '{ ok: boolean; suggestions: TicketSuggestion[]; error?: undefined; } | { ok: boolean; error: TicketDraftErrorPayload; suggestions?: undefined; }' is not assignable to type 'TicketSuggestionsGenerateResult'.
      Type '{ ok: boolean; suggestions: TicketSuggestion[]; error?: undefined; }' is not assignable to type 'TicketSuggestionsGenerateResult'.
        Type '{ ok: boolean; suggestions: TicketSuggestion[]; error?: undefined; }' is not assignable to type '{ ok: false; error: TicketDraftErrorPayload; }'.
          Types of property 'ok' are incompatible.
            Type 'boolean' is not assignable to type 'false'.
Typecheck found one inference issue in the new IPC handler: the `ok` discriminant widened to `boolean`. I’m tightening that handler’s return type so the shared contract stays precise.
`npm run typecheck` is clean. I’m running the full test suite now, including the new backend, schema, IPC contract, and renderer rendering coverage.

payload.text:
Summary of changes made:
- Added `ticket.generateSuggestions(projectPath)` through shared types, IPC, preload, schemas, and main handler.
- Implemented read-only/no-network Codex ticket suggestion generation with strict structured output, board ticket context, normalization, filtering, and max-10 capping.
- Added board topbar “Generate Tickets” button and modal with loading/error/empty/list states.
- Each suggestion can start the existing async `createDraft` flow with `preferredTicketType: "task"` and marks created rows while keeping the modal open.
- Added focused CSS and backend/schema/renderer tests.

Files changed:
- `src/shared/types.ts`
- `src/shared/ipc.ts`
- `src/preload/index.ts`
- `src/main/services/schemas.ts`
- `src/main/services/codex/index.ts`
- `src/main/ipc/methods/tickets.ts`
- `src/renderer/src/App.tsx`
- `src/renderer/src/styles.css`
- `tests/run-tests.mjs`
- `tests/schemas.test.ts`
- `tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`
- `tests/ticket-suggestions.test.ts`

Commands run:
- `git status --short`
- `git ls-files src tests package.json`
- `grep`/`sed` inspection commands
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`
- `git diff --check -- ...`

Tests run and results:
- `npm run typecheck`: passed
- `npm test`: passed, 115 tests
- `git diff --check`: passed

Remaining risks or follow-up:
- No known implementation risks. The existing worktree still has unrelated `.relay` changes that I left untouched.

payload.finalResponse:
Summary of changes made:
- Added `ticket.generateSuggestions(projectPath)` through shared types, IPC, preload, schemas, and main handler.
- Implemented read-only/no-network Codex ticket suggestion generation with strict structured output, board ticket context, normalization, filtering, and max-10 capping.
- Added board topbar “Generate Tickets” button and modal with loading/error/empty/list states.
- Each suggestion can start the existing async `createDraft` flow with `preferredTicketType: "task"` and marks created rows while keeping the modal open.
- Added focused CSS and backend/schema/renderer tests.

Files changed:
- `src/shared/types.ts`
- `src/shared/ipc.ts`
- `src/preload/index.ts`
- `src/main/services/schemas.ts`
- `src/main/services/codex/index.ts`
- `src/main/ipc/methods/tickets.ts`
- `src/renderer/src/App.tsx`
- `src/renderer/src/styles.css`
- `tests/run-tests.mjs`
- `tests/schemas.test.ts`
- `tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`
- `tests/ticket-suggestions.test.ts`

Commands run:
- `git status --short`
- `git ls-files src tests package.json`
- `grep`/`sed` inspection commands
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`
- `git diff --check -- ...`

Tests run and results:
